text: Chanting "Om" in this luminous, structured space, I feel both present and oddly removed. The glass doors and modern decor suggest a place of learning or innovation, yet my mind drifts elsewhere. With each resonant syllable, I try to center myself. Surrounded by technology and artful displays about research and development, I question the convergence of spirit and logic. My body is here, but my thoughts hover, suspended between material reality and inner contemplation. I am seeking calm amid innovation's hum.
